questions: what to do if someone is poisoned
answers: If someone is poisoned, call 999 immediately. Try to identify what they consumed. Don't induce vomiting unless instructed by a doctor. Keep the person calm and monitor their breathing.
Bish kheye felle prothome 999 call korun. Ki kheye6e seta janun — bottle ba packet thakle sheta rakhun. Bomi koranor try korben na, karon kono chemical e eta worse kore.

Poisoning first aid: Call emergency services, identify the poison if possible, don't give food or water unless told to. If the person is unconscious, place them in recovery position and monitor breathing.
Poisoning hole hospital e niye jan quickly. Poison er container/label niye jan — doctor er jonno helpful hobe. Breathing bondho hole CPR din. Chemical splash hole pani diye 20 minute wash korun.
